## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why does it make the agent's edits better or the engine more capable/reliable? -->

## Type
- [ ] Editing brain / playbook (AGENTS.md, docs/) — explain how it lifts performance
- [ ] Engine capability (src/forwrdcut/)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / examples

## Checklist
- [ ] Non-destructive (no source footage modified)
- [ ] EDP-driven / reproducible where applicable
- [ ] No whoosh / no fabricated stats baked into defaults or examples
- [ ] `python -m compileall src` passes; `ruff check src` reviewed
- [ ] Before/after frame or tiny repro attached where it helps
